en: I am at the school with my friends.

tr: Pazar günü bir toplantı için Ankara’dayım.
en: I am in Ankara for a meeting on Sunday.

tr: Ali uzun bir günün ardından ailesiyle beraber evde.
en: Ali is at home with his family after a long day.

tr: Sonbaharda Eylül ayında sevimli bir oteldeyiz.
en: We are in a lovely hotel in September in the autumn.

tr: Pazar akşamı bir doğumgünü partisi için onlarlayız.
en: We are with them for a birthday party on Sunday evening.
These books are for you.
I am there with my family in the afternoon.
The flowers of the mountain are very beautiful.
The people on the bus are very tired.
The glass on the table is empty.

tr: Ali uzun bir günün ardından çok yorgun.
en: Ali is very tired after a long day.

tr: Öğleden sonra saat 3’te bir toplantı için işyerindeyim.
en: I am at the workplace for a meeting at 3 o'clock in the afternoon.
The color of the flower is very beautiful.
The weather is rainy today.
This is an expensive car.
We aren't at school because of them.
This book is about the people in Turkey.
I don't want to go without you.

tr: Türkiye’nin sorunları hakkında bir kitap okumak istiyorum.
en: I want to read a book about the problems of Turkey.
I love the smile on your face.
When is our meeting?
Why aren't the children here?
How is your family?
Where does Ali work?
Who is Ayşe with?
Where do these people live?
Is the carpet in the living room old?
Is the cat in the garden hungry?
They are ready for the meeting at 8 o'clock.
The doctor in the hospital doesn't want to talk to me.
Where do you work?
We are at school to study English.
What kind of films do you watch?

tr: Güzel bir kadın, yaşlı bir adamla beraber.
en: A beautiful woman is with an old man.

tr: Oturma odasındaki halıyı sana vermek istiyorum.
en: I want to give you the carpet in the living room.

tr: Ali garsondan bir bardak su istiyor.
en: Ali wants a glass of water from the waiter.
I don't want to talk to you.
I am very tired but I don't want to sleep.

tr: Bir fincan kahve için 200 TL vermek istemiyoruz.
en: We don't want to give 200 TL for a cup of coffee.
Do you want to come with us?
Where do you want to live?
What time do you sleep?

tr: Arkadaşım yeni bir araba satın almak istiyor.
en: My friend wants to buy a new car.

tr: Ayşe bahçedeki kedilere süt vermek istiyor.
en: Ayşe wants to give milk to the cats in the garden.
I am with the love of my life.
I love the smile in your eyes.
I want to teach English to the students in the classroom.
The days of January are very short.

tr: Ayşe sabahleyin arkadaşlarıyla beraber okula gidiyor.
en: Ayşe goes to the school with her friends in the morning.

tr: Oğlum Cumartesi günü okula gitmek istemiyor.
en: My son doesn't want to go to the school on Saturday.
The children come from the school in the evening.
The cat at the window wants to play with me.

tr: Ayşe İngilizce öğrenmek için okula gidiyor.
en: Ayşe goes to the school to learn English.
My cat drinks milk from the glass.
I don't want to see you.
Ali doesn't want to go to the cinema with them.
Do you want to come with us?

tr: İyi bir restoranda yemek yemek ister misin?
en: Do you want to eat in a good restaurant?
I am in the hospital because of a bad friend.

tr: Perşembe öğleden sonra, önemli bir toplantı için işyerindeyiz.
en: We are at the workplace for an important meeting on Thursday afternoon.

tr: Ayşe uzun boylu bir adamla beraber.
en: Ayşe is with a tall man.

tr: Çocuklarım için iyi bir bilgisayar satın almak istiyorum.
en: I want to buy a good computer for my children.
Why do you want to sell your house?
The people in Turkey work to live.
When is the meeting?
What time is our meeting?
How is the weather in Istanbul today?
How old is your daughter?

tr: Bu yaz köydeki evimize gitmek istiyoruz.
en: We want to go to our house in the village this summer.
Whose car is this?
What time do you go to work?
When does Ali come from America?

tr: Cebimdeki parayla iyi bir araba satın almak istiyorum.
en: I want to buy a good car with the money in my pocket.

tr: Amcam bizi görmek için köyden geliyor.
en: My uncle comes from the village to see us.
I give the glass on the table to my mother.
The people in the sea are very happy.

tr: Zor bir haftanın ardından tatile gitmek istiyorlar.
en: They want to go on holiday after a difficult week.

tr: Çocuklarım için iyi bir gelecek istiyorum.
en: I want a good future for my children.
The plates on the table are from China.
Why do they want to come with us?
Why don't you want to study?
Who wants to come with us?
Who do you want to go with?
The money in my pocket is for my children.

tr: Bu yaz yüzmek için Antalya’ya gitmek istiyoruz.
en: We want to go to Antalya to swim this summer.

tr: Ayşe kışları seviyor ama yazları sevmiyor.
en: Ayşe likes winters but she doesn't like summers.

tr: Oğlumu görmek için kızımla beraber Ankara’ya gidiyorum.
en: I go to Ankara with my daughter to see my son.
Ayşe doesn't want to eat the vegetables in the kitchen.
Who is your teacher?

tr: Ayşe zengin olmak için okula gitmek istiyor.
en: Ayşe wants to go to the school to be rich.

tr: Televizyondaki insanlar Türkiye’deki insanların sorunları hakkında konuşmak istemiyor.
en: The people on the TV don't want to talk about the problems of the people in Turkey.
The money on the table is mine.
This water is for the flowers of the garden.

tr: Yemek yemek için küçük bir restorandayız.
en: We are in a small restaurant to eat.
The garden of my house is very small.
Your feet are very dirty.
I am very busy today because of you.

tr: Ali pis bir yatakta uyumak istemiyor.
en: Ali doesn't want to sleep in a dirty bed.
Do you want to come with us?
My students are very important for me.
